name: Potato Soup with Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a stockpot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring for 5-6 minutes until softened.
3. Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
4. Add the diced potatoes, celery, salt, and white pepper. Return to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining butter with flour. Mix well.
6. Beat in the eggs, additional salt, and nutmeg until smooth.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the simmering soup, allowing it to rise back to the surface.
8. Cover and continue simmering for 10 minutes.
9. Remove from heat, uncover, and gently stir in the sour cream before serving hot.
